title: Quiz: Backend Compilation
description: Test your understanding of backend-specific compilation

options.text: Coupling map, gate errors, coherence times

questions.question: Error-aware routing minimizes:

options.text: Accumulated gate errors along routing path

questions.explanation: Error-aware routing chooses paths with lower error accumulation.

questions.question: CNOT error rates can differ based on direction (control/target).
questions.explanation: CX(0,1) often has different error than CX(1,0).

questions.question: A transpilation pipeline typically includes:
questions.explanation: Full pipeline chains multiple transformation passes.
